name: Jason's Chicken Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper.
2. Optionally, flatten the chicken breasts to an even thickness.
3. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Add mashed garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
4. Remove from heat and stir in half of the garlic-butter mixture with the sour cream.
5. Coat each chicken breast with the sour cream mixture.
6. Roll the coated chicken breasts in the remaining parmesan mixture.
7. Place the breaded chicken breasts in a foil-lined baking dish, skin side down.
8. Bake at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes, basting occasionally with the remaining garlic butter from step 3.
9. During the last 5 minutes of baking, broil under high heat until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
10. Serve hot over linguine. Spoon sauce into the pan and sprinkle additional parmesan on top if desired.
Note: Cover leftovers tightly in an airtight container to maintain freshness.
